title: Prayer of Redemption
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Prayer of Redemption''' was a chant used by the [[Shamed Ones]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] who were involved with the [[Jeedai heresy]].

==Overview==
This prayer was used to gain favor and as a means to better the circumstances of the Shamed Ones involved in the Jedi Heresy. It was formed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after it was conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] and gained a high amount of popularity when the prophet [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]] came into power.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
